modal.title: AI Provider Configuration
modal.description: Select your AI provider and enter credentials. Settings are stored in browser localStorage.
modal.provider.label: Provider
modal.note.azure: Provide your Azure OpenAI endpoint URL, API key, and deployment name.
modal.note.custom: Custom endpoint URL. Auth header is optional.
modal.note.storage: Settings are persisted in browser localStorage under the key aXIOM_artefact_analyser_v1_config.
header.title: Artefact Analyser
header.subtitle: // prompt builder
panel.extractedContent: Extracted content — review & edit before building prompt
drop.text: Drop file here or click to browse
placeholder.paste:
Paste artefact content here — article text, transcript, OCR output, or description of visual/audio content.

ID is computed automatically from content + date + source type.
placeholder.content:
Extracted or pasted content appears here.

Paste tab: mirrors input directly.
URL / File tabs: AI-extracted, fully editable.
placeholder.prompt: Full prompt with ID pre-injected appears here after clicking Build Prompt.
status.pasteOnly: Paste mode only — no AI provider configured.
status.copyFailed: Copy failed — select all in right panel and copy manually.
status.providerRequired: AI provider required for URL fetch — click ⚿ to configure.
status.providerRequiredFile: AI provider required for file extraction — click ⚿ to configure.
cost.tooltip: Token usage and estimated API cost for this session. Prices are estimates — check your provider dashboard for accurate billing.
